_spec_to_mcp_mapping._comment: Each top-level field maps to specific MCP tool calls. Follow the execution order below.
execution_order: 3. seed_data -> write method depends on seed_data.method field

seed_methods.bulk: Use write_bulk(). cellset = dict of element-tuple strings to values.
seed_methods.cell: Use write_cell() per entry in cells[] array.
seed_methods.file: Use write_file(). Requires file_path on the TM1 server.
